description: A parent is asking about the rules and fees for their child to fly alone as an unaccompanied minor.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the airline's official policy for unaccompanied minors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct policy document.

nodes.task_description: Explain the age restrictions, eligible flights (e.g., no connections), and the UM service fee.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains all rules and fees.

nodes.task_description: Explain the drop-off and pick-up procedures, including the requirement for the designated adults to show ID.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a comprehensive overview of the process.
